use_cases: Display website previews and demos in documentation or landing pages
Frame embedded content or screenshots in marketing materials
Showcase web application interfaces in product demonstrations
Create realistic browser mockups for portfolio presentations
Wrap iframe content in a styled container for better visual appeal
ai_summary: A browser window preview component that renders a realistic browser frame with traffic light buttons and an address bar displaying a URL. Supports dark mode with appropriate color adjustments and accepts child components to display within the browser viewport. Commonly used in documentation, landing pages, and marketing materials to showcase web applications, demos, or screenshots with professional framing.
